name: Adamancipator Crystal - Dragite
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔救の奇石</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アダマシア・クリスタ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ドラガイト
desc: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of an "Adamancipator" card: You can draw 1 card. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 WATER Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, place this card on top of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Adamancipator Crystal - Dragite" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of an "Adamancipator" card: You can draw 1 card. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 WATER Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, place this card on top of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Adamancipator Crystal - Dragite" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of an "Adamancipator" card: You can draw 1 card. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 WATER Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; return it to the Extra Deck, and if you do, place this card on top of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Adamancipator Crystal - Dragite" once per turn.

action: Returns from your field to your Extra Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Extra Deck
Places itself from the player's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
